blurb: Destruction Warlock is TBC's endgame caster king: Shadow Bolt machine-gunning with the Improved Shadow Bolt debuff feeding every other warlock's damage too. The spec's phase curve is the steepest in the game — mediocre in Karazhan gear, untouchable in Sunwell. This Phase 5 snapshot aggregates 196 top DPS parses from Sunwell Plateau; the highest-consensus pick is Bracers of the Malefic at 91% usage.
statPriorityRationale: Shadow Bolt spam with Improved Shadow Bolt debuff uptime rewards crit unusually well, and by late phases destruction becomes the highest-ceiling caster in the game — the list leans damage-crit over regen because fights end before mana does.

faq.question: Where does Destruction Warlock Phase 5 BiS come from?
faq.answer: From the gear worn by 196 top-ranked Destruction Warlock DPS parses on Warcraft Logs during Phase 5 (Sunwell Plateau), aggregated per slot — what high parsers actually equip, not a spreadsheet ideal.

faq.question: What are the highest-consensus Destruction Warlock items in Phase 5?
faq.answer: Bracers of the Malefic (91%), Belt of the Malefic (91%), Boots of the Malefic (91%). When an item sits above ~70% among top parsers, treat it as the priority drop to chase.

faq.question: Should I follow this list exactly for Phase 5?
faq.answer: Use it as a loot-priority guide, not a checklist — expand each slot's alternatives, because second-choice items are often within a few percent and drop from entirely different bosses in Sunwell Plateau.
